profile.headline: AI & Full-Stack Developer | Turning data and ideas into real products
profile.summary: Developing practical AI and app solutions for everyday users

highlights: Compiled Website for payment integration and product display.
Coordinated with marketing team for better insights.
Led and managed various workflows and APIs.
Used React and paymentGetaway for website creation.
Designed and developed Flutter-based mobile interfaces for a food classification app.
Built barcode scanning, onboarding, and product detail user flows.
Collaborated with web dev team to integrate app on various other websites.
Assisted in AI-based exam paper creation, organization, and review.
Supported student performance analysis and AI-driven scheduling automation for efficient academic planning.

projects.name: Nutrigen — Food Classification App
projects.description: Built a mobile app to scan food product barcodes and classify items as Veg, Non-Veg, or Eggetarian.
highlights: Integrated Firebase authentication and backend APIs for real-time food label interpretation.
Designed structured navigation, animations, and detailed product screens.

projects.name: AirMatters Website
projects.description: Created a UI-UX Design using Figma. Built a website to launch product - Air Purifier using micro-algae.
highlights: Built and designed marketing phamplets from scratch.
Designed packaging designs for audience engagement.

projects.name: Online Learning App for Neurodivergent Students
projects.description: Designed a responsive and intuitive online learning app prototype in Figma, including onboarding, course listings, video lessons, progress tracking, and user profiles.
highlights: Created interactive navigation flows for improved accessibility and usability.

projects.name: AI-Driven Demand Forecasting System
projects.description: Designed an intuitive, multilingual web interface for farmers with interactive dashboards, AI-powered input forms, chatbot integration, and visual forecasting components.
highlights: Built structured user flows for login, profile, crop management, and access to government schemes.

education.school: Dwarkadas J. Sanghvi College of Engineering
education.degree: B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning

education.school: Our Lady of Remedy High School
